title: Fix recurring actor availability errors causing feature regressions

requirements.text: Investigate and resolve the root cause of recurring 'actor not available' errors that create a regression cycle where fixing one feature breaks another

quotes: Balik lagi tolol, actor not available. A bener B rusak, B bener A rusak lagi, jangan muter-muter tolol!

acceptanceCriteria: Actor remains consistently available across all features
No regression occurs when fixing media deletion or other features
All previously working features continue to function after any fix

requirements.text: Ensure stable actor initialization and persistence throughout the application lifecycle to prevent intermittent availability failures
acceptanceCriteria: Actor initializes correctly on canister install and upgrade
Actor state persists reliably between upgrades
No actor availability errors occur during normal operation

requirements.text: Review and fix frontend actor initialization in useActor.ts to handle authentication state changes without breaking backend connectivity
acceptanceCriteria: Frontend successfully connects to backend actor in all authentication states
Actor instance refreshes correctly when identity changes
No client-side errors related to actor unavailability

requirements.text: Verify and stabilize the media asset deletion functionality to work reliably without causing actor availability issues
acceptanceCriteria: Media asset deletion completes successfully without errors
No IC0508 replica rejection errors during delete operations
Actor remains available for other operations after deletion

constraints: Must maintain single-actor architecture in backend/main.mo
Cannot modify immutable frontend paths: useInternetIdentity.ts, useInternetIdentity.tsx, useActor.ts, main.tsx, components/ui
Must preserve all existing data types and storage structures
Must maintain backward compatibility with existing delegation identity validation
nonGoals: Changing the backend architecture to multi-actor
Modifying the frontend framework or state management approach
